info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Change Stream Records

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100,000). Default is 10. The 10 MB response size limit takes precedence over this value.

params.name: iteratorType
params.description: Determines the starting point for reading the stream.

params.name: commitNum
params.description: The commit number to start reading from. Required when iteratorType is AT_SEQUENCE_NUMBER or AFTER_SEQUENCE_NUMBER.

params.name: opNum
params.description: The operation sequence number within the specified commit. Default is 1.

items.docs: Gets a stream of change-log entries for property graph (Gremlin/openCypher) data. Each entry records a mutation (ADD or REMOVE) made to vertices, edges, or their properties. The response format is PG_JSON. This is the recommended endpoint for property graph streams, replacing the deprecated /gremlin/stream endpoint.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Change Stream Records (alias)

items.docs: Alias for /propertygraph/stream. Gets a stream of change-log entries for property graph data. Supports the same parameters and returns the same response format.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Change Stream Records

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100,000). Default is 10.

params.name: iteratorType
params.description: Determines the starting point for reading the stream.

params.name: commitNum
params.description: The commit number to start reading from. Required when iteratorType is AT_SEQUENCE_NUMBER or AFTER_SEQUENCE_NUMBER.

params.name: opNum
params.description: The operation sequence number within the specified commit.

items.docs: Gets a stream of change-log entries for RDF (SPARQL) data. Each entry records a mutation (ADD or REMOVE) of an RDF triple or quad. The response format is NQUADS, with each change represented as an N-Quads statement string.
